channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S.-Iran peace deal takes shape amid ongoing war threats
item.description: President Trump and officials temper hopes for a quick end to the Iran war, even as talks advance.

item.title: Elizabeth Smart says 'my body carried me' as she now celebrates it
item.description: After her abduction at 14, Smart struggled with body shame. Bodybuilding helped her reclaim her sense of self.

item.title: As diners stay home, a restaurant introduces pay-what-you-want pricing
item.description: With fewer Americans eating out, one restaurant now lets customers choose their own price for meals.

item.title: A major university system adopts AI, but not all students and faculty are convinced.
item.description: The California State University system provides an early example of what happens when an administration commits to a technology its own community questions.
